title: Barley-Break; Or, Last In Hell
content:
We two are last in hell; what may we fear
To be tormented or kept pris'ners here
Alas!    if kissing be of plagues the worst,
We'll wish in hell we had been last and first.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Barley-Break; Or, Last In Hell", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
